productTitle: MikroTik TOF-2400-8V-4 Antenna Kit for wAP LR2
name: MikroTik TOF-2400-8V-4 Antenna Kit for wAP LR2
title: MikroTik TOF-2400-8V-4 Antenna Kit for wAP LR2
title_extended: MikroTik TOF-2400-8V-4 Antenna Kit for wAP LR2 – 8 dBi Omni Antenna + SMA Cable + Mechanical Holder
short_description: Kit for wAP LR2: 8 dBi Omni antenna + SMA cable 1m + mechanical holder
description: The MikroTik Antenna Kit for wAP LR2 is designed to significantly extend your network coverage, offering robust performance for a range of applications, especially where MikroTik wAP LR2 device is used. This kit includes an external 8dBi Omni antenna, model TOF-2400-8V-4, which can enhance network coverage up to 3-4 kilometers in line of sight. Versatile and powerful, this antenna operates within the 2.4 GHz frequency range, making it suitable for both 2.4 GHz LoRa® connectivity and standard 2.4 GHz WLAN.

detailed_description.heading: Enhances Coverage Up to 4 Kilometers
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik Antenna Kit for wAP LR2 is designed to significantly extend your network coverage, offering robust performance for a range of applications, especially where MikroTik wAP LR2 device is used. This kit includes an external 8dBi Omni antenna, model TOF-2400-8V-4, which can enhance network coverage up to 3-4 kilometers in line of sight. Versatile and powerful, this antenna operates within the 2.4 GHz frequency range, making it suitable for both 2.4 GHz LoRa® connectivity and standard 2.4 GHz WLAN.

detailed_description.heading: Broad Compatibility and Easy Installation
detailed_description.text: One of the key features of this antenna is its broad compatibility with various 2.4 GHz devices, providing seamless integration and enhanced network performance. The antenna comes with a 1-meter long SMA cable and a mechanical holder, ensuring quick and easy attachment to masts or walls, depending on your installation needs. This flexibility allows you to place the antenna in the optimal position for maximum coverage and signal strength.

detailed_description.heading: Compact Yet Durable Design
detailed_description.text: Despite its compact size, the MikroTik Antenna Kit does not compromise on durability or power. It is designed to withstand the rigors of outdoor use while delivering consistent, high-quality performance. The antenna boasts an 18° vertical beamwidth and a 360° horizontal beamwidth, ensuring comprehensive coverage in all directions. With a nominal impedance of 50 ohms, the antenna is engineered to provide reliable and efficient signal transmission.

detailed_description.heading: Technical Specifications
detailed_description.text: Physically, the antenna measures Ø25 x 550 mm and weighs 0.6 kg, making it both lightweight and easy to handle. The RF connectors include one SMA Female and one RP-SMA Female, providing versatility in connection options. The antenna can be mounted on a wall or a pole, offering flexibility in installation to suit different environments and requirements.
